error.signature: CMake Error: Could not create named generator Ninja
error.regex: (Could not create named generator|CMake Error.*generator.*not found|Generator.*is not available)

verdict.summary: Requested CMake generator (Ninja, Visual Studio, etc.) is not installed or not in PATH.

dead_ends.action: Install a random build system hoping it provides the generator
dead_ends.why_fails: Only the specific requested generator is needed; installing Make does not provide Ninja.

dead_ends.action: Downgrade CMake version to one that 'includes' the generator
dead_ends.why_fails: Generators are separate executables, not bundled with CMake. Version is irrelevant.

workarounds.how: sudo apt install ninja-build  # for Ninja generator

workarounds.action: Set PATH to include the generator binary location
